name: ctm360-cyberblindspot
label: CTM360 CyberBlindspot
description: CyberBlindspot is CTM360's Digital Risk Protection platform which combines surface, deep, and dark web monitoring, including brand protection, anti-phishing, and takedowns. This connector allows you to ingest the details from the platform and take response actions.

fields.title: Server URL
fields.description: Specify the Server URL to which you want to connect and perform automated information.
fields.name: server
fields.tooltip: Specify the Server URL to which you want to connect and perform automated information.

fields.title: API Key
fields.description: Specify the API Key to connect to the endpoint and perform automated operations.
fields.name: api_key
fields.tooltip: Specify the API Key to connect to the endpoint and perform automated operations.

fields.title: Verify SSL
fields.description: Specifies whether the SSL certificate for the server is to be verified. By default, this option is selected, i.e., set to true.
fields.name: verify_ssl
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the SSL certificate for the server is to be verified. By default, this option is selected, i.e., set to true.

operations.title: Get Incidents
operations.description: Retrieves a list of incidents from CTM360 Blindspot based on the filter criteria that you have specified.

parameters.title: Date Field
parameters.description: (Optional) Select the data field to retrieve incidents from CTM360 Blindspot. You can choose either Created Date or Updated Date. By default, the field is set to "Created Date".
parameters.name: date_field
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Select the data field to retrieve incidents from CTM360 Blindspot. You can choose either Created Date or Updated Date. By default, the field is set to "Created Date".

parameters.title: Date From
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify the date and time to retrieve results that include only those items that were created/updated after the specified timestamp.
parameters.name: date_from
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Specify the date and time to retrieve results that include only those items that were created/updated after the specified timestamp. The date must be in the format DD-MM-YYYY hh:mm, for example: "01-01-2025 00:00".

parameters.title: Date To
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify the date and time to retrieve results that include only those items that were created/updated before the specified timestamp.
parameters.name: date_to
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Specify the date and time to retrieve results that include only those items that were created/updated before the specified timestamp. The date must be in the format DD-MM-YYYY hh:mm, for example: "01-01-2025 00:00".

operations.title: Close Incident
operations.description: Close a specific incident based on the ticket ID that you have specified.

parameters.title: Ticket ID
parameters.description: Specify the ticket ID of the incident you want to close.
parameters.name: ticket_id
parameters.tooltip: Specify the ticket ID of the incident you want to close.

operations.title: Request Takedown
operations.description: Request takedown on a detected incident in CTM360 Blindspot based on the ticket ID that you have specified.

parameters.title: Ticket ID
parameters.description: Specify the ticket ID of the incident you want to take down.
parameters.name: ticket_id
parameters.tooltip: Specify the ticket ID of the incident you want to take down.

operations.title: Add Comment
operations.description: Add a comment to a specific incident in CTM360 Blindspot based on the ticket ID and comment parameters that you have specified.

parameters.title: Ticket Id
parameters.description: Specify the ticket ID of the incident to which you want to add a comment.
parameters.name: ticket_id
parameters.tooltip: Specify the ticket ID of the incident to which you want to add a comment.

parameters.title: Comment
parameters.description: Specify the comment you want to add to the incident. Note: Special characters are not allowed.
parameters.name: comment
parameters.tooltip: Specify the comment you want to add to the incident. Note: Special characters are not allowed.

operations.title: Get Malware Logs
operations.description: Retrieves a list of malware logs from CTM360 Blindspot based on the filter criteria that you have specified.

parameters.title: Date From
parameters.description: Specify the date and time to retrieve results that include only those items that were created after the specified timestamp.
parameters.name: date_from
parameters.tooltip: Specify the date and time to retrieve results that include only those items that were created after the specified timestamp. The date must be in the format DD-MM-YYYY hh:mm, for example: "01-01-2025 00:00".

parameters.title: Date To
parameters.description: Specify the date and time to retrieve results that include only those items that were created before the specified timestamp.
parameters.name: date_to
parameters.tooltip: Specify the date and time to retrieve results that include only those items that were created before the specified timestamp. The date must be in the format DD-MM-YYYY hh:mm, for example: "01-01-2025 00:00".

parameters.title: Page Size
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify the maximum number of results this operation should return, per page, in the response. By default, it will be fetch 5000 records and maximum 10000 records.
parameters.name: size
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Specify the maximum number of results this operation should return, per page, in the response. By default, it will be fetch 5000 records and maximum 10000 records.

operations.title: Get Domain Protection
operations.description: Retrieves a list of domain protection from CTM360 Blindspot based on the filter criteria that you have specified.

parameters.title: Date From
parameters.description: Specify the date and time to retrieve results that include only those items that were created after the specified timestamp.
parameters.name: date_from
parameters.tooltip: Specify the date and time to retrieve results that include only those items that were created after the specified timestamp. The date must be in the format DD-MM-YYYY hh:mm, for example: "01-01-2025 00:00".

parameters.name: date_to

parameters.title: Incident Type
parameters.description: Specify the incident type to filter the records.
parameters.name: type
parameters.tooltip: Specify the incident type to filter the records.

parameters.title: Risk Score Min
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify the minium risk score to be used for filtering domain protection.
parameters.name: risk_score_min
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Specify the minium risk score to be used for filtering domain protection. The minimum possible risk score falls within the range of 0 to 100.

parameters.title: Risk Score Max
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify the maximum risk score to be used for filtering domain protection.
parameters.name: risk_score_max
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Specify the maximum risk score to be used for filtering domain protection. The maximum possible risk score falls within the range of 0 to 100.

parameters.title: Finding Status
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify the finding status to filter the records.
parameters.name: finding_status
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Specify the finding status to filter the records.

parameters.title: Page Size
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify the maximum number of results this operation should return, per page, in the response. By default, it will be fetch 5000 records and maximum 10000 records.
parameters.name: size
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Specify the maximum number of results this operation should return, per page, in the response. By default, it will be fetch 5000 records and maximum 10000 records.
